input_json.clause_text:
Table 1
| Zone | Min setback (m) |
| R40  | 4.5             |
| R60  | 4.0             |
| R80  | 3.0             |

expected_json.detail: Table values cannot be promoted to rule candidates without a parent normative clause providing applicability context (jurisdiction, zone applicability, condition_json). clause_id is null and no normative_context was supplied.

metadata_json.name: No-orphan — table without normative clause context rejected
metadata_json.notes: Validates the no-orphan audit: isolated table values or numbers that lack a parent normative clause (clause_id=null, no applicability/condition context) must be flagged and not promoted to rule candidates. This prevents phantom rules from tables extracted out of context. Ref: MASTER_REBUILD_PLAN.md §8.1 'no-orphan audit'. Illustrative table values only (R40/R60/R80 setbacks are not real). source_version_id must be replaced at Stage 3.
